text.value: The canonical URL for an Implementation Guide must point directly to the implementation guide resource, not to the Implementation Guide as a whole
The HTML fragment 'ip-statements.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [dependency-table.xhtml, dependency-table-short.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The HTML fragment 'globals-table.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
A definition for CodeSystem 'http://loinc.org/' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated

None of the codings provided are in the value set 'FHIR Document Type Codes' (http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/doc-typecodes|4.0.1), and a coding is recommended to come from this value set (codes = http://loinc.org/#71230-7)
Bundle entry missing fullUrl
Relative Reference appears inside Bundle whose entry is missing a fullUrl
Unable to resolve resource with reference 'Encounter/episodio'
Relative Reference appears inside Bundle whose entry is missing a fullUrl
Unable to resolve resource with reference 'Patient/mother'
Constraint failed: cmp-1: 'A section must contain at least one of text, entries, or sub-sections'
Relative Reference appears inside Bundle whose entry is missing a fullUrl
Relative Reference appears inside Bundle whose entry is missing a fullUrl
Constraint failed: cmp-1: 'A section must contain at least one of text, entries, or sub-sections'

Wrong Display Name 'Newborn delivery information from newborn Narrative' for http://loinc.org#57075-4. There are no valid display names found for language(s) 'en'. Default display is 'Newborn delivery information'
Constraint failed: cmp-1: 'A section must contain at least one of text, entries, or sub-sections'
Constraint failed: cmp-1: 'A section must contain at least one of text, entries, or sub-sections'
Relative Reference appears inside Bundle whose entry is missing a fullUrl
Unable to resolve resource with reference 'Organization/destino'

This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://example.com/fhir/example/StructureDefinition/CompositionNoticia|1.0.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice)

This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://example.com/fhir/example/StructureDefinition/CompositionNoticia|1.0.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice)

Slice 'Composition.section:birth.entry:birthInfo': a matching slice is required, but not found (from http://example.com/fhir/example/StructureDefinition/CompositionNoticia|1.0.0). Note that other slices are allowed in addition to this required slice

Slice 'Composition.section:birth.entry:episode': a matching slice is required, but not found (from http://example.com/fhir/example/StructureDefinition/CompositionNoticia|1.0.0). Note that other slices are allowed in addition to this required slice

This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://example.com/fhir/example/StructureDefinition/CompositionNoticia|1.0.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice)
Constraint failed: bdl-9: 'A document must have an identifier with a system and a value'
Constraint failed: bdl-10: 'A document must have a date'
Except for transactions and batches, each entry in a Bundle must have a fullUrl which is the identity of the resource in the entry

Conformance resource /github/workspace/fsh-generated/resources/CodeSystem-documentclassificationCS.json - the canonical URL (http://example.com/fhir/example/CodeSystem/documentclassificationCS) does not match the URL (http://terminology.hl7.pt/CodeSystem/documentClassificaiton)
CodeSystems SHOULD have a stated value for the caseSensitive element so that users know the status and meaning of the code system clearly
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.caseSensitive is mandatory, but it is not present

The resource should declare its jurisdiction to match the package id (hl7.fhir.pt.obs-neonat, jurisdiction = urn:iso:std:iso:3166#PT instead of or as well as [http://unstats.un.org/unsd/methods/m49/m49.htm#001: 'World']) (for Sushi users: in sushi-config.yaml, 'jurisdiction: urn:iso:std:iso:3166#PT "null"')
URL Mismatch http://example.com/fhir/example/CodeSystem/documentclassificationCS vs http://terminology.hl7.pt/CodeSystem/documentClassificaiton

Conformance resource /github/workspace/fsh-generated/resources/CodeSystem-tipo-episodio-cs.json - the canonical URL (http://example.com/fhir/example/CodeSystem/tipo-episodio-cs) does not match the URL (http://terminology.hl7.pt/CodeSystem/tipoepisodio)
CodeSystems SHOULD have a stated value for the caseSensitive element so that users know the status and meaning of the code system clearly
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.caseSensitive is mandatory, but it is not present
